name: Alcidion Group Limited
description: Alcidion Group Limited is an Australia-based healthcare technology company that provides software and services to improve patient safety and clinical decision-making. The company's flagship product, Miya Precision, is an intelligent informatics platform that integrates clinical data from various systems to provide real-time insights, clinical decision support, and mobile access for healthcare professionals. Alcidion serves hospitals and healthcare organizations across Australia, New Zealand, and the United Kingdom, helping them streamline workflows, reduce clinical risk, and enhance patient care delivery.
